O

occupiedCells - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Ship
 
occupies(Coordinate) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Ship
 
occupyingShip - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Cell
 
onMachineFleetReady(boolean) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
Callback for FleetPlacementThread: once the machine's fleet is placed, creates the GameSession (human goes first), wires the opponent board for shots, enables the debug fleet-preview button, and performs the very first autosave.
onMachineShot(Coordinate, CellState, boolean) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
Callback for MachineTurnThread, always invoked on the FX Application Thread.
onMachineShot(Coordinate, CellState, boolean) - Method in interface com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.concurrency.MachineTurnThread.MachineActionCallback
Notifies the controller of the machine shot's outcome.
onPlacementReady(boolean) - Method in interface com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.concurrency.FleetPlacementThread.PlacementReadyCallback
Called after the background placement attempt completes.

Represents the orientation a ship can have on the board.
